Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First looking at the events the activities start with Register patient in different departments and for different patients Since each registration is a new patient that might be the starting point for a case Lets note the register events

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: These are three separate registrations Then looking further events 4 5 12 15 are related to the 45M patient in ER

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event 4 Initial triage for 45M in ER Thats the same as Event 1 Then event 12 is Doctor consultation for 45M in ER leading to diagnosis and event 15 is discharge So this is one case starting with registration event 1 triage 4 then consultation 12 and discharge 15

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Then events 2 5 8 11 12 wait event 12 is 45M so no for patient 62F registration event2 triage event5 lab test requested event8 completed event11 consultation event12 no event12 is 45M Wait event12s patient is 45M

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me list each event with their details

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then event11 is Doctor consultation for 62F Then event14 prescription for 62F Then event17 patient discharged for 62F So events 2 5 8 11 14 17 are the 62F case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then for the 28M in Surgery event3 registration then event6 doctor consultation scheduled knee surgery event9 surgery prep event13 surgery performed event16 recovery room event18 discharge Thats all 28M in Surgery So events 3 6 9 13 16 18 are the 28M case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then for the 45M in ER events1 4 7 12 15 Because event7 is X ray for 45M event12 is doctor consultation leading to diagnosis then event15 discharge So thats the 45M case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Looking at all events So all events are covered by these three patients Each of the three initial registrations events1 2 3 correspond to the three cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the 45M ER case Register 1 triage 4 X ray 7 consultation 12 discharge 15 The timeline is 0805 0810 0815 0823 0830 That makes sense Patient comes in gets triaged sent for X ray then doctor consults and discharges

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the 62F ER case Register 2 triage 5 lab test requested 8 lab completed 10 consultation 11 prescription 14 discharge 17 Timeline 0807 0812 0816 0820 0822 0827 0835 All in order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the 28M Surgery case Register 3 consultation 6 surgery prep 9 surgery 13 recovery 16 discharge 18 Timeline 0807 0813 0816 0825 0831 0840 Also in order

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Each case has a logical flow from registration to discharge with activities in sequence The departments also align ER cases stay in ER or related departments while the Surgery case is handled in Surgery and related departments

Name: Validation - PE
Text: No overlapping ages or genders between cases except for the 45M and 62F both in ER but their activities are separate
